_comment: ViceSharp.AiReview.Tests aiUnit review config. ActiveStrategy=grok drives the operator's logged-in Grok Build CLI through the local claude-protocol shim at tools/aiunit-grok-claude-shim. aiUnit's cli adapter only speaks the Claude CLI protocol on stdin (Command=claude), so publish tools/aiunit-grok-claude-shim/ClaudeShim.csproj and prepend that publish folder to PATH before running these tests; Model records the Grok model id used by the shim. Set AIUNIT_GROK_REVIEW_ROOT to a source-only review fixture if the full repo bundle exceeds Grok's upload limit. AIUNIT_STRATEGY env var overrides ActiveStrategy at runtime (e.g. AIUNIT_STRATEGY=claude to use the Claude CLI directly).

grok.Description: Grok Build via the local Claude-protocol shim at tools/aiunit-grok-claude-shim. Publish ClaudeShim.csproj and prepend the publish folder to PATH before running ViceSharp.AiReview.Tests so aiUnit stdin is forwarded to 'grok --model grok-build --prompt-file'.

claude.Description: Claude Code CLI on the operator's Claude subscription (Sonnet 4.6). Reviews run with repo filesystem access. Long timeout because a code/project review reads many files.

claude-api.Description: Anthropic HTTP API fallback. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to activate. HTTP agents have no repo filesystem access, so reviews are limited to the prompt text.

grok-api.Description: xAI Grok-4 through the OpenAI-compatible HTTP API (no CLI/shim). Set XAI_API_KEY to activate. No repo filesystem access.
